gt_sql: SELECT T3.DisplayName, T3.Location FROM tags AS T1 INNER JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.ExcerptPostId = T2.Id INNER JOIN users AS T3 ON T3.Id = T2.OwnerUserId WHERE T1.TagName = 'hypothesis-testing'
pred_sql: SELECT u.DisplayName, u.Location FROM tags t JOIN posts p ON t.ExcerptPostId = p.Id JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id WHERE t.TagName = 'hypothesis-testing';
question: Mention the display name and location of the user who owned the excerpt post with hypothesis-testing tag.
